# Contributing

Thank you for your interest in Twill DB.

Twill DB is currently in an experimental, maintainer-led research phase. At this
stage **we are not accepting external code contributions or pull requests.**

You are very welcome to:

- Open issues
- Report bugs
- Discuss the architecture
- Suggest features

**Pull requests are not being accepted and may be closed without review.** This
is not a reflection on the quality of the work — the architecture is still
moving quickly, and merge decisions are currently reserved to the maintainer
(see [`GOVERNANCE.md`](../GOVERNANCE.md)).

We plan to revisit the contribution policy once the architecture stabilizes.

## A note on licensing

Twill DB is distributed under the **Business Source License 1.1** (see
[`LICENSE`](../LICENSE)), which is a source-available — not open source —
license. You are free to read, evaluate, self-host, and run the software,
including in production for your own applications. Offering Twill DB to third
parties as a hosted or managed database service is not permitted under the
license. Each released version converts to the Apache License 2.0 on its Change
Date.

If you have a use case that the license does not appear to cover, please open an
issue to discuss it.
